note: Fix one edge case in the wallet send fee loop. The post-loop 'force one more rebuild at the exact authoritative fee' branch (which exists so the confirm dialog and the broadcast see byte-equal numbers) ran AFTER the S8 guard, so a rebuild that picked a different UTXO set (more inputs needed once the bumped fee tipped over a balance threshold) could grow txSize past feeStocks again and the user would get a node-side S8 reject after pressing Confirm. The S8 guard now runs LAST, after the rebuild, and refuses with a clear error before the confirm dialog shows. NO consensus, NO RPC, NO node, NO miner. Pure wallet-side ordering fix.
